name: Fluoride sensor (riboswitch + CRISPRa)
shortDescription: Detects fluoride in drinking water using a natural fluoride riboswitch as the sensor, gating a CRISPRa circuit driving a fluorescent reporter, in the food-grade GRAS chassis Lactococcus lactis.

input.detects: Fluoride in drinking water (relevant to the ~1.5 mg/L WHO guideline)
input.operatingRange: Fluoride riboswitches respond over the high-µM to mM range

sensing.sensorMechanism: A natural fluoride (crcB) riboswitch in the 5' UTR binds fluoride and switches expression of its downstream gene ON.
sensing.signalFlow: F- -> fluoride riboswitch turns ON expression of an sgRNA -> dCas9-activator amplifies a weak reporter promoter (CRISPRa) -> fluorescence rises with fluoride.

parts.name: Fluoride riboswitch (crcB class)
parts.source: Natural fluoride riboswitch (Baker et al. 2012, Science)
parts.notes: RNA aptamer in the 5' UTR; fluoride binding switches expression on. Place upstream of the sgRNA.

parts.name: sgRNA (under riboswitch control)
parts.source: designed for CRISPRa upstream of a weak reporter promoter

performance.notes: Uses an RNA riboswitch sensor rather than a protein regulator; the riboswitch and CRISPRa are validated separately and integration is a design template.

safety.biocontainment: thyA-based containment in L. lactis; food-grade host.
safety.notes: GRAS / food-grade chassis (no LPS endotoxin); relevant to drinking-water fluoride monitoring.

buildSteps.title: Design riboswitch-sgRNA transcript
buildSteps.description: Place the fluoride riboswitch 5' of the sgRNA; design the CRISPRa spacer.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: P32 -> riboswitch -> sgRNA. TU2: dCas9-omega. TU3: weak promoter -> mCherry. Use NICE-compatible vectors.

buildSteps.title: Expose to fluoride
buildSteps.description: Validate across a fluoride standard curve.

provenance.source: Design template combining a natural fluoride riboswitch with L. lactis CRISPRa
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
